name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Thankful for this good news and I look forward to further good news. Another hurdle behind you. Yeah! Continued prayers for a new beginning.

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: So happy that your adorable Lyla is now post-surgery and under wonderfully trained watchful eyes. Your heart must be so happy, relieved, and so full of thanksgiving. I’m rejoicing with you! Continuing to pray for your precious little girl.

name: Larissa Perim
body: Glory and Honor to the Lord Our God! <3

name: Courtney Shaw
body: Thank you Lord. All the praises. Continuing to send peayers and love.

name: Mindy Leach
body: Praise God!!!! So many thoughts and prayers coming up from Stingel!! 💗💗💗💗💗
